text: Update for UK team: from 1 Jan 2026, remote work policy changes to 3 days remote per week allowed, manager approval no longer needed for standard arrangements. Handbook update to follow.
Reminder: UK annual leave carry-over exception for 2025 only - up to 5 days may be carried into 2026 due to the Q4 crunch. This is a one-time exception.
VPN client v5 is now mandatory. Old client stops working Feb 1. Install guide: see IT manual section 3.
anyone know if we get Friday off for the offsite? lol
India team: probation period for Engineering roles is now 6 months (was 3), effective for offers signed after 1 March 2026. Other functions unchanged.
